style_prompt: Redraw this exact composition as the engineer's underdrawing hidden beneath an embroidered tapestry: precise ink construction lines on aged drafting vellum, ruled guides, measurement ticks, schematic symbols, circuit-like connection traces, faint grid, sepia and indigo ink. Keep every figure and object in exactly the same position and silhouette as the source image; replace the woven texture with technical line work. No letters, no words.
image_prompt: Conditioned on panel-07 (composition-locked underdrawing). Panel scene: At the centre, a great domed legislature radiates woven golden rays like a romanesque sun; beneath it, eight horizontal foundation strata in different coloured threads form its bedrock; around it, people and orange automata stand together in calm pairs; the old towers appear only as faint pale outlines fading at the panel edges.
